---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why does this matter? What problem does it solve or what outcome does it improve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you'd like. UI mockups or examples are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Relevant research, links, or related issues.
